---
name: Feature or rule request
about: Suggest a new rule, check, or improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the rule or feature.

**For a new rule**
- **Rule set:** mechanics / AP / Chicago / APA / MLA / custom
- **Example text it SHOULD flag:**
- **Example text it should NOT flag (avoid false positives):**
- **Suggested fix, if any:**

**Why is this useful?**
What problem it solves for writers.

> Note: Wordsmither stays free and fully local — deterministic, in-browser
> checks only. Requests for AI/backend features are unlikely to land unless the
> cost/benefit is discussed first.
